name: Remote: Long Duration Flow Detected
notes: Detects a flow communicating to the Internet with a sustained duration of more than 48 hours.  This is not typical behavior for most applications.  Investigate the host for potential malware infections.
conditions_text: when the flow context is Local to Local
when the flow duration is greater than 48 hours
TD_list: APPLY Remote: Long Duration Flow Detected on flows which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND NOT when the flow context is Local to Local
AND when the flow duration is greater than 48 hours
RED_list: Event name: Long Duration Flow Detected

Event description: Detects a flow communicating to the Internet with a sustained duration of more than 48 hours.  This is not typical behavior for most applications.  Investigate the host for potential malware infections.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
